title: scrophularia ghahremanii
intro: Scrophularia ghahremanii is a species of flowering plant in the family Scrophulariaceae, commonly known as the Ghahreman's figwort or Ghahreman's scorpion flower. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scrophularia ghahremanii include reducing inflammation and pain, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or extract, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies and supplements, although its efficacy and safety have not been extensively studied in modern clinical trials.
